What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Two men stand on blue padded floor mats surrounded by blue cylindrical punching bags hanging from red wall mounts. The man on the left wears black Muay Thai shorts with gold designs and maintains a defensive boxing posture. The bearded man on the right wears a black t-shirt with a green and yellow circular logo while demonstrating striking techniques. A white wall with a red horizontal stripe runs along the background of the gym.

canonical_answer: At 0s, the man on the right holds up two fingers while the partner stands defensively; at 4s, the bearded man covers his head in a defensive posture; at 12s, the bearded man throws a right cross punch towards his partner; at 14s, he raises his arm to block the side of his head; at 18s, the man on the left raises his gloves to a guard position.
